title: asplenium dodecaploideum
intro: Asplenium dodecaploideum, also known as the many-leaved spleenwort, is a type of fern native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Asplenium dodecaploideum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in infusions or capsules.
